patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Pretendard Variable, Wanted Sans Variable.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, title, description, confirmText, cancelText, onConfirm, onCancel, tone, style, className.
<Alert> tone must be one of 'primary' | 'negative'.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: src, alt, name, shape, size, variant, style, className.
<Avatar> shape must be one of 'circle' | 'square'.
<Avatar> variant must be one of 'person' | 'company'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, tone, size, variant, count, style, className.
<Badge> tone must be one of 'primary' | 'blue' | 'violet' | 'green' | 'red' | 'orange' | 'cyan' | 'pink' | 'neutral'.
<Badge> size must be one of 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.
<Badge> variant must be one of 'weak' | 'solid'.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, tone, size, leadingIcon, trailingIcon, iconOnly, fullWidth, disabled, children.
<Button> variant must be one of 'solid' | 'outline' | 'assistive' | 'text'.
<Button> tone must be one of 'primary' | 'neutral' | 'negative'.
<Button> size must be one of 'large' | 'medium' | 'small'.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, variant, padding, radius, interactive.
<Card> variant must be one of 'outlined' | 'elevated' | 'plain'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, checked, defaultChecked, onChange, disabled, size, style, className.
<Checkbox> size must be one of 'medium' | 'small'.
<Chip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, active, size, leadingIcon, trailingIcon, disabled.
<Chip> size must be one of 'large' | 'medium' | 'small'.
<Divider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: vertical, strong, inset.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, color, title.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, variant, size, color, disabled.
<IconButton> variant must be one of 'normal' | 'background' | 'outline'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'large' | 'medium' | 'small' | 'xsmall'.
<Logo> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, height, color.
<Logo> variant must be one of 'horizontal' | 'wordmark' | 'symbol'.
<Radio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, checked, defaultChecked, onChange, name, value, disabled, style, className.
<SegmentItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, onChange, disabled, size, label, style, className.
<Switch> size must be one of 'medium' | 'small'.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, badge.
<Textarea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, helperText, error, rows, maxLength, disabled.
<TextField> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, helperText, error, size, leadingIcon, trailingIcon, onTrailingClick, disabled.
<TextField> size must be one of 'large' | 'medium' | 'small'.
<Toast> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, status, action, onAction.
<Toast> status must be one of 'default' | 'success' | 'error' | 'info'.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, position, children.
<Tooltip> position must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'.
